details: Read unary_op_utils.cpp - HARDTANH is parametrized type but no case in get_op_init_and_func_parameterized. compute kernel path is default eltwise_sfpu.cpp. approx_mode default false. Need to search broader codebase for hardtanh dispatch.
TANH not found in get_op_init_and_func_default switch. Investigating how TANH is dispatched - may use FPU math path or unary_ng.

HARDTANH has core SFPU function _calculate_hardtanh_ in both WH and BH ckernel_sfpu_hardtanh.h. But no API header (hardtanh.h) exists in tt_metal/hw/inc/api/compute/eltwise_unary/ and no LLK dispatch in llk_lib/. Also not in sfpu_split_includes.h. The op is registered as parametrized in is_parametrized_type() but get_op_init_and_func_parameterized() has no case for it (only default TT_THROW). This is a partially-implemented op with only the SFPU kernel available.

ckernel_sfpu_tanh.h was deleted in Phase 1 deep nuke. LLK dispatch also deleted. API header still references llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_tanh but implementation is gone. Will analyze based on surviving patterns and reference files.

key_findings: SOFTSHRINK has UnaryOpType enum entry and is_parametrized_type=true, but NO case in get_op_init_and_func_parameterized or get_op_init_and_func_default. No softshrink_tile API, no ckernel_sfpu_softshrink.h, no LLK dispatch. The SFPU kernel implementation does NOT exist in this codebase.

note: No SFPU kernel implementation exists - operation is type-system stub only

notes: XIELU enum exists but get_op_init_and_func_parameterized has no case for it - throws TT_THROW. is_parametrized_type does not include XIELU. No SFPU kernel code exists anywhere in codebase.

key_findings: NO SFPU kernel implementation exists. XIELU was nuked and not reimplemented. Enum value exists in UnaryOpType, C++ function exists, nanobind binding is disabled (#if 0). unary_op_utils.cpp has no dispatch case for XIELU.

notes: No SFPU kernel exists - no instructions to decode

details: TANHSHRINK enum exists in UnaryOpType but get_op_init_and_func_default has no case for it - would throw TT_THROW. No ckernel_sfpu_tanhshrink.h exists. No tanhshrink_tile API exists. No nanobind binding for forward op.

key_findings: No SFPU kernel exists for TANHSHRINK. The UnaryOpType::TANHSHRINK enum exists (line 111 unary_op_types.hpp) and REGISTER_UNARY_OPERATION macro creates a C++ function, but get_op_init_and_func_default has no case for it (would throw TT_THROW). No ckernel_sfpu_tanhshrink.h, no tanhshrink_tile API, no nanobind forward binding. Previously composite: x - tanh(x).

details: No SFPU instructions to analyze - operation has no SFPU kernel implementation in this codebase version.

Full analysis of hardtanh SFPU kernel complete. Operation is partially implemented: has core SFPU function _calculate_hardtanh_ (identical in WH and BH) but missing API header and LLK dispatch layers. The kernel uses SFPI abstractions (vFloat, dst_reg, v_if/v_endif). Takes 3 FP16_B params: p0=-neg_thresh, p1=-(pos_thresh-neg_thresh), p2=-pos_thresh. Implements clamping via additive threshold checks. No approximation mode relevance.

tanh SFPU implementation fully nuked: ckernel_sfpu_tanh.h deleted (wh+bh+quasar), LLK dispatch deleted, SfpuType::tanh removed from enum, get_op_init_and_func_default case removed. API header compute_kernel_api.h still has tanh_tile() calling llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_tanh but no definition exists. SFPNONLINEAR tanh mode=0x5 exists on Quasar only.

key_findings: Uses SFPI abstractions (vFloat, dst_reg, v_if/v_endif). Takes 3 FP16_B params for additive threshold clamping. WH and BH implementations are identical.

notes: Operation has no SFPU kernel implementation. Analysis documents the absence and provides evidence.
